name: Briami Mystras (Multi-vegetable & Herb Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak okra in vinegar to remove slime, then rinse well. Eggplant may be salted and rinsed before slicing if desired.
2. In a large bowl, combine all the vegetables, reserving half of the tomatoes. Season with parsley, dill, salt, and pepper, and mix thoroughly.
3. Layer the vegetables alternately in a large casserole dish.
4. Heat olive oil in a small pan. Sauté scallions and garlic until fragrant.
5. Chop the remaining tomatoes and add them to the sautéed scallions and garlic, stirring briefly.
6. Spoon the tomato mixture over the layered vegetables in the casserole.
7. Sprinkle bread crumbs on top of the casserole.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour. Serve warm or cold.
Eggplant: Slice as desired before baking.
